title: neltuma juliflora var. horrida
intro: Neltuma juliflora var. horrida, also known as the Horrid Neltuma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is said to have medicinal properties, traditionally used in various cultures to treat ailments such as fever and inflammation. The health benefits of Neltuma juliflora var. horrida are attributed to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to prevent infections and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling its roots and leaves in water, and are used as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
